global.description: The ad features a combination of shapes and text elements centered around a brand message.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save with confidence.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A large circular shape in the center of the ad, filled with a solid color.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A large rectangular shape in the center of the ad, filled with a solid color.

elements.label: Vertical rectangle
elements.description: A vertical rectangle positioned slightly off-center, filled with a solid color.

elements.label: Large circular shape
elements.description: Another large circular shape in the center of the ad, filled with a solid color.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Medium circle
elements.description: A medium-sized circular shape located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: A prominent text message at the bottom of the ad, conveying a reassuring message.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand logo 'ClearLedger' displayed at the top of the ad in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button at the bottom of the ad inviting users to 'Try for free' in a clear, bold font.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: A small label indicating 'UGC' positioned at the top left of the ad.
